## Task Description
Apply grid layout to an element that has more than two children. Use at least three grid-related attributes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] display: grid applied
- [ ] More than two children within the grid container
- [ ] At least 3 grid properties used (e.g. grid-template-columns, gap, grid-row)
- [ ] Pushed via Pull Request

## Related Lab Section
Part 2 - CSS / Layouts / Grid
